MATCH (n:molecule)-[r1:transform*..]->(m: optional match (n:molecule)-[*0]-(view_vetex)-[r1:transform*..]->(m:molecule) with n,m,collect(view_vetex) as view_vetexs with n,m,size(view_vetexs) as num,view_vetexs optional match (n)-[r:MULTI_TRANSFORM{is_view:true}]->(m) with collect(r) as views, n,m,num,view_vetexs UNWIND range(0,num-1) as i delete views[i]
